description: A farmer wants to know the optimal planting depth for their corn based on soil moisture and temperature.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the soil moisture and temperature readings at various depths (1, 2, 3 inches).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the current soil condition data.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the short-term weather forecast to assess near-term planting conditions.
Recommend an optimal planting depth to ensure the seed is placed into adequate moisture but is warm enough for germination.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends planting at a depth of 2 inches.
